name: useMediaControls
description: that provides controls for HTML media elements (audio/video)
examples: const { playing, play, pause } = useMediaControls(audioRef, { src: 'audio.mp3', type: 'audio/mp3' });
const { ref, playing, play, pause } = useMediaControls<HTMLVideoElement>({ src: 'video.mp4', type: 'video/mp4' });

parameters.name: src
parameters.description: The source URL of the media

source.source: * @param {string} src The source URL of the media

tokens.name: src
tokens.description: The source URL of the media

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing media controls and state
